title: Facebook Friend Invaders
body: [![Facebook Friend Invaders](http://farm3.static.flickr.com/2225/2093098780_60ae6714bb.jpg?v=0)](http://apps.facebook.com/invaders "Facebook Friend Invaders game")For a social network to be successful, I think it is essential that it offers an API so that anyone can develop applications that can be useful to us, or simply entertainment. These [applications or *mashups*](http://www.xarop.com/mashups/ "What are mashups?") can be as fun as this one from [PimPamPum](http://www.pimpampum.net "PimPamPum website"), the lifelong Martian killer, in this case the Martians are our FaceBook contacts. [http://apps.facebook.com/invaders](http://apps.facebook.com/invaders/ "Facebook Friend Invaders")
